name: structured-liquidity
description: Copy-paste component registry for the Structured Liquidity design language. Each component lists its class names, variants, and ready-to-paste HTML. Include the stylesheets and kit script below, then use the markup verbatim.

conventions.container: Rigid container = border var(--border-w) solid rgb(var(--edge)) + flat shadow var(--hard-x) var(--hard-y) 0 0 var(--hard-shadow) + border-radius var(--radius).
conventions.glass: Add the .glass class (or backdrop-filter blur(var(--glass-blur)) over rgba(var(--glass-tint), var(--glass-alpha))) for liquid depth.
conventions.icons: Leading Lucide icon first, then the label, on nav links and buttons.
conventions.interactivity: Elements with data-toggle-aria / data-toggle-group / data-open-overlay / data-close-overlay are wired by structured-liquidity-kit.js.

components.name: button
components.description: Primary action. Variants and sizes via class. Leading Lucide icon optional.

components.name: badge
components.html: Default Secondary Outline Live Error

components.name: toggle
components.description: Single pressable toggle and an exclusive toggle group. Wired by the kit script.

components.name: switch
components.description: On/off switch. Toggle state via aria-checked; wired by the kit script.

components.name: checkbox
components.description: Checkbox. State via aria-checked; wired by the kit script. Keep the .sl-box + .tick SVG so the checked state renders.
components.html: Label text

components.name: radio-group
components.description: Mutually exclusive radio items. The [data-radio-group] wrapper is required — the kit script enforces single selection within it.
components.html:
Dark mode
Light mode
System

components.name: input
components.description: Text field with label. Pair with .sl-field for description/error rows.

components.name: slider
components.description: Range slider with filled track and thumb.

components.name: card
components.description: Glass card — the canonical rigid container holding liquid glass. Use .glass for depth.
components.html:
Card title

Body copy inside a rigid container holding liquid glass.

components.name: tabs
components.description: Tabbed navigation. The .tablist holds buttons with aria-selected; sibling .panel nodes hold content (the active one carries .show). Wired by the kit script.
components.html:
First panel content.
Second panel content.
Third panel content.

components.name: dialog
components.description: Modal dialog. Trigger with data-open-overlay; close with data-close-overlay. Wired by the kit script.
components.html:
Title

Dialog body copy.

components.name: sheet
components.description: Side panel sliding in from the structural edge.
components.html: Settings
